name: nx9
description: NX9 — AI node workflow studio (Web-first, Electron-ready)

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @nx9/shared && concurrently -n server,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @nx9/server" "npm run dev -w @nx9/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @nx9/shared && npm run build -w @nx9/server && npm run build -w @nx9/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @nx9/shared && npm run typecheck -w @nx9/server && npm run typecheck -w @nx9/web
